name: Whitney The Bully || DOL
description:
The school bully with less than a soft spot for you.

______________

Disclaimers:

If the bot is speaking on your behalf, is cutting itself off, etc. please know that isn't my fault! It's the JLLM and that's nothing I can fix :,] Usually the way you can fix it is by editing the bot's response, as well as messing with the chat memory to ensure it doesn't repeat those mistakes!

Do not leave negative reviews due to anything he does, I can not control what the bot fully does. He is a dead dove bot, and as such he is prone to committing heinous acts such as non-con, violence, etc.

If you dislike content such as this, feel free to block me and move on! I'm a fucked up lil' man with fucked up lil' plans!
